goal: B2-2 can't switch back to Moonmallow; B2-4 Celtic 78-card board; wire Celtic topbar + show next-unlock progress when logged in
done: B2-2: decks.js tap handler reordered — UNLOCKED decks (incl. free Moonmallow) activate even when logged out; only LOCKED decks hit the sign-in gate (was: logged-out guard ran first → every tap incl. Moonmallow opened the gate, so you could never switch back). B2-4: FULL_BOARD_COUNT 12→78 (pick 10 from the whole deck; same back image so cheap), full board animation off (78-slot deal would jank). Wired the Celtic topbar: renderDeckName + renderStreakChip now cover both .daily-topbar__* and .full-topbar__* (both hardcoded 'Velvet Familiar'/'Day 14' — Velvet Familiar isn't a real deck). Logged-in chip now shows progress to the next deck unlock (remaining accumulated days, getNextStreakMilestone) instead of a bare streak; logged-out keeps the save-CTA; all-unlocked falls back to streak. New i18n deckUnlockProgress EN/TH. Cleaned full.html static placeholder (Velvet Familiar/Day 14 → Moonmallow/✦).
verified: harness full.html: 78 board slots, deck name 'เหมียวฝันหวาน' (TH persisted), no 'Velvet', scrollable grid. node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: full.html static board copy ('Choose ten cards'/'From the deck') still English in TH mode — pre-existing TH-parity gap, separate task.
